ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person responsible for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., CO, NOx, O3) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date the reading was taken */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the reading (e.g., good, suspect, invalid) */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor at the time of the reading (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the station at the time of the reading (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorological_data" (
  "meteo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorological data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the data was collected */,
  "meteo_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "meteo_time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "air_pressure" REAL /* Air pressure in hPa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorological_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., CO, NOx, O3) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used for the request (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* URL of the request */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* HTTP response status code */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the request in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was triggered */,
  "pollutant" TEXT /* Pollutant that triggered the alert (e.g., CO, NOx, O3) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the pollutant (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., threshold exceeded, sensor malfunction) */,
  "acknowledged" TEXT /* Whether the alert has been acknowledged (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "acknowledged_by" TEXT /* User who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was acknowledged */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was acknowledged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time the forecast was made */,
  "pollutant" TEXT /* Pollutant being forecasted (e.g., CO, NOx, O3) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Forecasted level of the pollutant (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "pollutant" TEXT /* Pollutant being reported (e.g., CO, NOx, O3) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Reported level of the pollutant (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report (e.g., 2023-05-01 to 2023-05-31) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  "approval_time" TEXT /* Time the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the study was published */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the study */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the study */,
  "funding" TEXT /* Funding source for the research */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Area of the research (e.g., urban air quality, industrial emissions) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the research (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id")
)
